design_philosophy: A 'godly' corporate premium aesthetic. Restraint combined with intentionality. Deep Navy Blue provides authority and trust, while Gold accents offer a premium, successful feel. Clean, structural typography and spacious layouts.

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for pills/buttons

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50. Sticky top-0 z-50.
surface_strategies.marketing_cards: Crisp white background (bg-white), 1px border (border-slate-200), soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm). On hover: border-accent_gold/50, shadow-xl, -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no shadow. Dense and compact.
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay over hero image to ensure text contrast: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0B2447]/90 via-[#0B2447]/60 to-transparent.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A059] text-white hover:bg-[#b08d4a] shadow-md font-semibold transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0B2447] text-white hover:bg-[#081b36] shadow-md font-semibold transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-md
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0B2447] text-[#0B2447] hover:bg-[#F8F9FA] font-semibold transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-md

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn UI forms. Inputs should have generous padding (h-12), rounded-md borders, and focus:ring-accent_gold.
components_strategy.navigation: Clear, non-hamburger on desktop. Logo left, Links center, Primary CTA ('Apply Now') right. Hamburger for mobile only.

hero_background.description: Modern bright airport corridor with glass, representing global travel and success.

global_map_texture.description: Abstract minimalist global world map in deep navy blue with subtle shimmering gold nodes. Use as a background for 'How it Works' or 'Global Reach' sections.

trust_seal.description: 3D metallic gold premium trust seal. Use in 'Why Choose Us' or Footer for authority.

visa_work.description: Professionals shaking hands in modern office. Use for Work Visa card/page.

visa_study.description: College students walking on campus. Use for Study Visa card/page.

visa_tourist.description: Friends reading map outdoors. Use for Tourist/Visit Visa card/page.

employer_hero.description: Corporate business professionals in a premium office. Use for Employers page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the marketing pages (Home, About, Programs, Employers) with raw HTML/Tailwind for layout freedom. Use overlapping elements and bento grids.
Integrate Shadcn UI strictly for interactive components: forms (Apply, Contact, Employer Registration), Dropdowns, Accordions (for FAQs), Dialogs, and Tabs.
The Admin Dashboard must be a distinct layout. Use a sidebar and top header. Cards should be flat and dense.
For avatars in the testimonial section, use 'https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=1' (increment u parameter for different faces).
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='apply-now-btn').
Ensure headings use 'font-poppins' and body text uses 'font-sans' (configured to Open Sans). You MUST install these fonts from Google Fonts in the index.html or global css.
Do not use generic placeholder image URLs. Only use the image_urls provided in this JSON.
Add 'framer-motion' for subtle scroll-based entrance animations (fade-up) to give a premium feel.
